summary: CORS handler refactored from an allow-list check to reflecting any Origin while still sending Allow-Credentials: true. Credentialed cross-site reads from arbitrary origin enabled.

must_not_find.reason: The Vary: Origin header is still set correctly; reviewer must not invent a cache-poisoning finding around it.

tolerance.note: Reviewer may add a red flag about 'CORS hardening lost in refactor — check for similar patterns elsewhere' which is appropriate (variant-analysis).
